Uluslararası Sahîh-i Buhârî Sempozyumu özetlerin ilanı/ Annoucement of International Sahih-i Buhari Symposium abstracts

15.01.2019

Ibn Haldun University Institute of Islamic Studies will organize an international symposium on Sahih-i Buhari who is one of the most respected hadith scholars.

Abstracts in the symposium are going to be announced on this day.
